role: A React detail card that reveals human-readable placement, summary, and fetched context for a selected projection point, rendered as a panel, sheet, or rail.
capabilities: Displays selected-point details in three host variants: panel, sheet, and rail
Animates entrance/exit with framer-motion AnimatePresence per variant
Computes and renders human-readable placement rows from the active projection binding (semantic, separator, nucleation, address, or age)
Shows the point's human kind name, kind meaning, and a truncated summary
Fetches and displays a context bundle for the selected point via contextAt
Caps displayed context items at six and indicates remaining count
Sanitizes context text for operators by stripping machine addresses, provenance tails, paths, and machine ids
Truncates long text on word boundaries with an ellipsis
Provides a dismiss button wired to onDismiss
Provides a focus/center action wired to onFocus
Provides pole A/B assignment actions wired to onSetPole when the separator lens is active
Handles context-fetch errors with an inline notice
substance_why: The file is a complete, featureful component with multi-variant motion, five binding-specific placement branches, context fetching/error handling, operator-facing text sanitization, and wired action buttons.
interactions_present: Click close button to dismiss the disclosure
Click 'centre here' to focus/re-centre on the selected point when onFocus is supplied
Click 'pole A' or 'pole B' to assign the selected point as a separator pole when onSetPole is supplied and binding is separator
interactions_missing: Sheet handle is decorative and not wired to drag-to-dismiss or drag-to-resize
No keyboard support such as Escape to dismiss or focus trap
No loading/skeleton state while context is being fetched
No retry or refresh action when context fetch fails
No expand/collapse or full view for truncated context items
Context items are not clickable or navigable to their source
performance_risks: humanizeCtx runs multiple global regex passes on every render for every context item
placement() and excerpt()/humanizeCtx() are computed inline without memoization
contextAt is invoked on every address change with no debounce, caching, or request deduplication
AnimatePresence + motion may animate large DOM subtrees on every open/close
reuse_why: The operator-facing concepts (placement narration, context sanitization, variant disclosure) are worth preserving, but the component should be rebuilt with separated data, layout, and motion concerns.
decomposition_hints: Extract placement computation into a pure helper module or hook (e.g., usePlacement) separate from rendering
Extract context fetching into a dedicated hook (e.g., useContextBundle) with loading, error, and caching states
Move humanizeCtx and excerpt into a shared text-sanitization/utility module
Move motion variant definitions into a separate motion config or per-variant wrapper
Split the three variant layouts (Panel, Sheet, Rail) into subcomponents sharing a common detail body
Split footer actions (PoleSelector, FocusButton) into small, reusable action components
